premise: My sister secretly canceled my $15,000 wedding venue two weeks before the ceremony, pocketed the nonrefundable deposit for her own honeymoon, and told everyone I’d called it off. Five years later, when she needed a co-signer to buy her dream home, I lent her the down payment at 25% interest — and when she missed a single payment, I foreclosed, sold the house for a $40,000 profit, and sent her the itemized bill.
